node.statement: N1.1 (Phi is <1/4-idempotent; P well-defined). By GT-idempotence-inheritance applied to the GT-hyp data (j unital order-isometric Jordan embedding, C unital positive, Phi=Cj, F=jC): ||Phi^2-Phi|| <= ||F^2-F||. Since ||F^2-F||_cb<=eta and ||.||<=||.||_cb gives ||F^2-F||<=eta<1/4, hence ||Phi^2-Phi||<=eta<1/4. Therefore by def-spectral-idempotent the binomial series for R=(S^2)^{-1/2}, S=2Phi-1, converges (||S^2-1||=4||Phi^2-Phi||<=4eta<1), so P=theta(2Phi-1) is well-defined and A=Im P (def-near-fixed-algebra) is well-defined.
